Context:

-Since some may be confused on "Duurrrr why sexy kill fox not sexy kill durrrrr me no likey me think goonslop!", REAAADDDD

- In korean folklore, Kuhimo can reach human in like... various ways? I dont know, most stuff is from reddit and some are from other sites:

  • If a Kumiho refrains from killing and eating humans for 1,000 days, it can become human. (This is what Ju Dong is trying.... Totally didn't fail once and had to wait all those thousand days again)

  • If a Kumiho marries a human and can live with them for 100 days without revealing their true identity (i.e., not letting the spouse see their nine tails or fox-like nature), they become human. They also gotta not fall in love in that human (Or so i've been told)

  • consuming the livers or hearts of 100 people (What the OG SCP did) in the span of 1,000 years

  • If some human who discovers the Kumiho's true nature keeps it a secret for a specific period, the Kumiho can become human.

  • there is one with a bead but that's boring

- No idea if these are accurate, i aint korean.

- This is BEFORE she got grabbed by the foundation, so she DOESNT know what a kitsune is, what a weeaboo is, and why she should hate humans

- And she is a lot more thicker than the usual artwork because she is WELL FED

-She may or may not have a few siblings.......
